zh.lifeSummary: 當Denise verch Hopkin於大約1325年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根馬福時，她的父親Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan46歲，母親Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel43歲。她與Thomas De Barri II結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1402年在英國英格蘭享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Denise verch Hopkin于大约1325年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根馬福时，她的父亲Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan46岁，母亲Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel43岁。她与Thomas De Barri II结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1402年在英国英格兰享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hopkin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh (southern): from a pet form of the personal name Hobb, a pet form of Robert (see Hobbs ).

variants.name: Robert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Gilles, Normand, Armand, Lucien, Pierre, Emile, Michel, Edouard, Gaston, Yves.

French, Walloon, English, German, Dutch, Flemish, and Breton (of French origin); Hungarian (Róbert): from the ancient Germanic personal name Ro(d)bert (Middle English Robert, Old French Ro(d)bert), composed of the elements hrōd ‘fame, renown’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This is found occasionally in Anglo-Saxon England before the Conquest, but in the main it was introduced into England by the Normans and quickly became popular among all classes of society. Pet forms and diminutives are found from an early date, Robin being particularly common. Compare Robair , Robar , Robare , and Rober .
In some cases also an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Hopkinson
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Hobkin (see Hopkin ) + -son.

variants.name: Hopkins
meanings: English and Welsh (Glamorgan): variant of Hopkin with genitival or excrescent -s. In Ireland, where the name is also frequent, it is sometimes Gaelicized as Mac Oibicín.
History: Stephen Hopkins (c. 1580–1644) was a pilgrim on the Mayflower in 1620 and one of the founders of Plymouth Colony. At his death he left seven children and eighteen grandchildren.

nameMeanings.name: Denise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of   Denis  , widely used in the English-speaking world since the 1920s.  See also  Dionysia .

variants.name: Denyse
meanings: feminine form of   Denis  , widely used in the English-speaking world since the 1920s.  See also  Dionysia .

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Denise verch Hopkin was born about 1325, in Mawr, Glamorgan, Wales, her father, Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan, was 46 and her mother, Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel, was 43. She married Thomas De Barri II. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1402, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78.

Elle a épousé Thomas De Barri II. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1402, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Denise verch Hopkin um 1325 in Mawr, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan 46 und ihre Mutter Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel 43. Sie hat Thomas De Barri II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1402 im Alter von 78 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Thomas De Barri II. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1402, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Denise verch Hopkinが約1325年にウェールズグラモーガンマウルで生まれた時，父Hopkin ap Hywel Fychanは46歳，母Gwenllian verch Rhys Foelは43歳であった。Thomas De Barri IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1402年にイギリスイギリスで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Denise verch Hopkin(이)가 대략 1325년 웨일스 글램르건 마르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 Thomas De Barri II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1402년 영국 잉글랜드에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Denise verch Hopkin nasceu aproximadamente 1325, em Mawr, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel, tinha 43 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Denise verch Hopkin родилась около 1325 г. в местности мар, глэморган, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas De Barri II. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1402 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Denise verch Hopkin nació aproximadamente 1325, en Mawr, Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Hopkin ap Hywel Fychan, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Gwenllian verch Rhys Foel, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Thomas De Barri II. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1402, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 78 años.
